verse_text: 'Their feet are swift to shed blood;

links.context: Ps 13 describes both Jews and Gentiles who say in their hearts, "There is no God" (v. 1; see also [[ROM.3:9]]-18). For although they may claim to know God, nevertheless, they are actually denying He exists, because of (1) their total involvement in a state of moral depravity (vv. 1, 3); (2) their refusal to seek God (v. 2); (3) their persecution of God's righteous people (vv. 4-6); and (4) their denial of the Incarnate God, the Lord Jesus Christ (v. 7).
